events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, was born on this day in 1940 in Liverpool, England, and rose to global fame as the drummer for The Beatles.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six trips around the sun for the legendary Ringo Starr today! What's your all-time favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking anthems to iconic solos, what's the Queen song that showcases his genius best for you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in 1943 in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young for the incomparable Mick Jagger! Six decades of rock 'n' roll swagger – what's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV officially launched in the United States, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV's First Spin
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV first hit screens, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a stylish new outfit?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's the track from that album that still gives you all the feels?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, commenced on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the fields of Woodstock came alive with three days of peace and music. Which iconic performance from '69 still resonates with you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years on, the impact of Tupac Shakur's music and artistry remains undeniable. Remembering a true icon today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His influence is still felt across music today. Which of his tracks blows your mind every time?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969 in the UK, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something'.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Magic
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' final recorded masterpiece still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite moment from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are timeless. What's your top Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite track he's lent his iconic vocals to?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971 in the US, becoming one of the most influential songs of the 20th century.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since the first iPod dropped? It changed everything for music lovers. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Celebrations
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, who's your favourite Bond and what's your top 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who was born on this day in 1940 in Liverpool, England, and would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
